# Map-ML-Ace 🚀

An AI-assisted web application created using **Lovable** to explore machine learning concepts and AWS ML Associate topics.
This project demonstrates how AI-powered development tools can be used to quickly prototype and build interactive web applications.

🔗 **Launch Live Application**

## 🛠️ Tools & Technologies

* **AI Development Platform:** Lovable
* **Frontend Framework (auto-generated):** React + Vite
* **Language:** TypeScript
* **Styling:** Tailwind CSS & shadcn/ui
* **Backend / Database:** Supabase

## ✨ Key Features

* **AI-Assisted Development:** Built using Lovable's AI-driven application builder.
* **Interactive Learning Tool:** Helps explore machine learning concepts and AWS ML certification topics.
* **Modern Web Stack:** Generated application using React, TypeScript, and modern UI components.
* **Responsive Design:** Works on both desktop and mobile devices.
